{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220314224EBDE5BA2CCED7A3BD34"}"},"total":486},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7181599176407859972","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我是一名资深看客，对与武侠和，剑道类的小说，观看很多，这一本小说写的非常棒，小说内容丰富，情节生动有趣，有寻天涯，和泰硬的，搞笑担当，第一章小月的为爱疯魔，个人觉得风华杀她的做法是对的，一是她触犯了规矩，二是她喜欢的人要下药毒死整座客栈的人她还包庇，这样的做法却是很不妥，

这部小说我感觉可以拍成一部30多集电视剧，他的剧情类似雪中但两个小说有截然不同。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672096578,"group_id":"7110781377951304735","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书百遍奇异现会写出好的作品","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9QaAFOwsS4FDbm5bxeAKUWFw0zAaMumRn7K+ac3RVNL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/370377441ff14f61882616ab94ed36b8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704856&x-signature=1hXZ%2BVx4ub5jl53gevIJ73ivNag%3D","user_id":"3633212904964632","user_name":"一只白狐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3633212904964632","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7110781377951304735","book_info":{"abstract":"【剑客巅峰开始讲述+江湖+门派+朝廷+无升级+配角也有人生】
有人率百万雄兵开疆扩土，有人拿起了剑便握起了天下！
十年前，风华躲进南山！一酒一剑隐于世，负尽狂名数十年！
十年后，他开了个客栈！剑气冲霄八百里，天下谁敢不识君！
只是他不入江湖，江湖却一直都在！
风华三下南山！
也曾一剑血洗满江城！
也曾一剑抵挡百万兵。
也曾冲天剑气透长安，满城金甲也枉然！
天下之大，有些人只需一剑，凡事也只出一剑！
然，迄今为止，还没人能挡住他的一剑！
一剑出，天下再无风雨再无晴！
【PS：此书又叫：一剑！里面有许多配角他们也有着属于自己的人生，对他们的文笔描述也有不少。】
这是自己很用心写的一本书，刚开始那个规矩设定上有自己的疏漏，真的很抱歉。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e1d7417bcaafd976c4d49170890fefaa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"敬酒","author_id":"","book_id":"7110781377951304735","book_name":"开局无敌：开个客栈扮猪吃虎","book_short_name":"一剑我如故","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1715人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":868,"name":"剑修","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=868&name=剑修&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7110782789607391775","read_count":"1715","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"361096"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"175","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,武侠,无敌,扮猪吃虎,剑修","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e1d7417bcaafd976c4d49170890fefaa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304462&x-signature=J%2FunAYpL4VAZSvNzqOpvA6%2FNHrQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"70529436649","extra":{"comment_jump_schem a":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.69821e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220314224EBDE5BA2CCED7A3BD34"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5698,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":12140},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1659059033,"author_reply_time":1659060311,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7165564664401740544","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很棒，真的很棒，每个角色有血有肉，虽然刻画不多，但是能体会到。可以说这部小说其实也满足了很多人的侠客梦，但是又不会让我们距离生活很远。从某种角度上说，生活是不完美的，但小说不一样，我们可以在当中弥补自己的遗憾，让我们享受一个美好的结局。最后，作者在文章的最后真的是很尽心尽力，很不错，不知道各位什么感受，我的感受是十分清晰的，我能够代入作者笔下的每一个角色，体会他们的情感，我想大多数朋友也是同样的感觉。最后的最后，希望作者能有更好的作品。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668363377,"group_id":"7110781377951304735","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"德行不求完美无缺，能有半数足以","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx5FACos5Wua3Z70L+pnDt8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/101644dc60d54d25ba74801c50346aff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709970&x-signature=WVUyuTbTEHJZNahrFlXlp5a7w6o%3D","user_id":"949567676747470","user_name":"唐半德"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"949567676747470","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7110781377951304735","book_info":{"abstract":"【剑客巅峰开始讲述+江湖+门派+朝廷+无升级+配角也有人生】

十年前，风华躲进南山！一酒一剑隐于世，负尽狂名数十年！
